description: CompositionWhite round neck sleeveless t-shirt with contoured panels, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, made of 100% polyester with a mesh back, blue panels on shoulders and brand logo in black on left chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean Whether you're lifting weights at the gym, playing volleyball at the beach or jogging in the park, rest assured, this white nike t-shirt is all set to offer you the best of comfort. Engineered with Dri-fit technology, it wicks away sweat while you burn those unwanted carbs, offering easy movement at the same time. The mesh back provides ample ventilation allowing your skin to breathe freely, while the blue panels add a dash of summery color to this white tee. Pair it with track pants or shorts, and show off your well-toned arms in this sleeveless tee.
